recentTweets.text:
Kansans living with Crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis deserve access to the best care possible.

Thanks to the @CrohnsColitis Foundation for the conversation about advancing research, supporting patients, and improving treatment. https://t.co/4S5c9ruHg6

The future of aviation runs through Kansas!

Enjoyed talking with Kansans from @aaaedelivers about aviation safety, modernizing our air traffic system, and supporting the workers who keep America flying. ✈️ https://t.co/fAl0lPH0xw
Good ideas don't have a party label. Proud to team up with @RepDerekSchmidt to ensure rural communities have reliable access to the services farmers depend on. https://t.co/YXe2fhczoG

A year ago, the administration shut down the LGBTQ+ option on the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline. I said then it was the wrong decision — and it still is.

This has never been about politics. It’s about making sure a young person in crisis has someone there to answer the phone https://t.co/izkFm8lIZA
Every extra dollar at the gas pump is a dollar Kansas families can't spend somewhere else. We need to lower costs, not drive them higher. https://t.co/P2bUskgE8U
From Kansas to the Moon. 🌕 Olathe’s Mid-State Aerospace is what Kansas manufacturing is all about. https://t.co/zRpSRO9BPc

Kansas City has the talent and know-how to solve big challenges.

I’ve been proud to support this effort from day one — and this investment will strengthen our supply chains, create good-paying jobs, and help build the future right here in the heartland.

Today, the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee marked up Congress' major water infrastructure bill.

I made the case for investing in Kansas communities facing flooding, drought, and the infrastructure challenges that come with both. @TransportDems https://t.co/3j1hrfyoUd

If you're wondering why your health insurance costs more…House leadership let tax credits expire.

Premiums are now 77% higher for many Kansans. https://t.co/U1NbHHGij3

Kansas farmers take pride in feeding the world. Food for Peace helps make that possible, while increasing the number of buyers for our crops.

I joined @NPR’s All Things Considered to talk about the bipartisan work to restore this important program. https://t.co/0NyRBCoeOT
Affordable housing isn't a "big yawn." It's a “BIG DEAL!” https://t.co/61irZ4B0y1
Mid-State Aerospace in Olathe normally helps rockets lift off, but last week they gave me a lift instead. 🚀Thanks for the tour! https://t.co/nbR6nKgnjj
Every person who boards a plane deserves to know that safety comes first. My bipartisan ALERT Act will help prevent future tragedies like the ICT-DCA collision. https://t.co/KMGZqNq9aX

The best part of #America250 is celebrating the people who make our country what it is. 🇺🇸

I was honored to present flags flown over the U.S. Capitol to local veterans and their families. Thank you for your service and sacrifice. https://t.co/LfJa5uIi4v

The people who keep our communities running shouldn’t be the ones paying the price for bad economic decisions.

This year, the administration’s reckless tariffs are costing:
🍎 Teachers - $280
🧑‍🚒 Firefighters - $270
🩺 Healthcare workers - $860

America’s story isn’t just written in Washington — it’s written in communities across the country.

Great meeting with historical societies from across #KS03 to celebrate the stories, people, and places that make Kansas such an important part of our nation’s history. #America250 https://t.co/t5Ub2PfRLU

Childcare shouldn’t be the thing standing between parents and the opportunities they’ve worked for.

I’ve introduced bipartisan legislation to make quality, affordable childcare easier to access for Kansas families.
When egg prices hit record highs, I sat down with a local restaurant owner to hear how it was affecting their small business. https://t.co/jyaMUwOfT7
Families are paying more for groceries, gas, and now airfare. We need steady, reliable diplomacy that keeps costs down — not chaos that leaves working people paying the price. https://t.co/8mO0wi26WZ

Last chance! 🇺🇸 Send me a short video telling me what America means to you.

I want to share the stories, people, and places that make Kansas such an important part of America's story. https://t.co/Uwpmu2VPvf

⏰ The clock is ticking: President Trump has until midnight to sign our bipartisan housing bill into law.

Instead of letting this bipartisan solution move forward, he’s chosen delays and political games. The good news? It will become law anyway.

I’m proud Congress came together
These young women at Madam President Camp are smart, driven, and ready to lead. Thanks for letting me be part of the fun! https://t.co/PnHQU5GnZL
Kansas Senator Pat Roberts understood that agriculture is bigger than politics. I have that same belief. https://t.co/lqNfVr9E1G

In Kansas, we know seconds matter when a tornado is headed our way. I’m pushing back on unnecessary staff cuts that are putting families at risk.
https://t.co/5o96ekMNsB
Kansans deserve lower housing costs, not political games. It’s time for @POTUS to do his job and sign the bipartisan ROAD to Housing Act into law. https://t.co/iveOtlLgzz

At the Franklin County Veterans Memorial, I joined Franklin County Honors for a moment of silence as part of the #America250 celebration.

A simple but important reminder: everything we have as a country comes back to the courage of our servicemembers. Thank you to all who serve. https://t.co/GInfout9d0
We passed a bipartisan bill to lower housing costs and build more homes. It’s still waiting to be signed into law. https://t.co/xyY8eeMiwY

What does America mean to you?

I'm inviting Kansans to help tell our country's story through my #America250 video project. Submit a short video by Friday using the link below!🗽
https://t.co/BRllJOcetg

Kansas is helping send Americans back to the Moon. 🚀🌕

Mid-State Aerospace played a role in the Artemis II mission — proof that Kansas manufacturers are leading the way in innovation.

That's why I fought back against cuts to the Manufacturing Extension Partnership, which helps https://t.co/8jHFQC34B5

It's game day, USA! ⚽️

Had a blast at the Theater in the Park watch party last week. Where are you watching from tonight?! https://t.co/AkoDwFgJGH

One of my favorite parts of this job is getting to recognize talented young Kansans.

Congratulations to Sawyer Peralta, runner-up in this year's Congressional Art Competition! His piece, "The Coin Toss," will be hanging in my district office all year. https://t.co/4d3Gsg1lVK
Kansas ranchers are raising serious concerns about the threat of New World Screwworm — and they're right. https://t.co/ribFmVC4F1
Getting the care you need shouldn't break the bank. I'm in Congress to lower healthcare costs and make sure every Kansan can get the affordable care they deserve close to home.
Seniors have spent their entire working lives paying into Social Security. Congress must act NOW to protect it. https://t.co/5lUov9U0iK
Happy America 250 ❤️🤍💙 Wishing everyone a safe and happy Fourth of July. Hope it’s a great day with the people you love! https://t.co/LvNrVDGYMl
Such a fun stop in Ottawa! Got to check out the traveling Declaration 1776 Exhibit before all the America 250 celebrations kick off tomorrow.🗽 https://t.co/x6U7ejoxis
I'm working with @RepDerekSchmidt to ensure Kansas farmers have the tools they need to succeed. https://t.co/NuxytI0J5X
RT @RepDavids: America is turning 250! 🇺🇸 Scan the QR code to submit a short video on what our country means to you! https://t.co/EI01Ae16wn
If you haven't heard, I'm kind of an infrastructure nerd. Loved seeing the impacts of the bipartisan infrastructure law in Miami County! https://t.co/FEQvIinVPY

Members of Congress shouldn't be able to profit from the stock market while writing the rules.

I'm working to ban congressional stock trading because public service should never be about personal profit.

Kansas is dealing with flooding in some places and drought in others. It’s hurting our families and economies.

I’m working to pass a bipartisan water infrastructure bill, so we have the tools to prepare for both.

Today is Postal Workers Day, and I’m thinking about my mom. She worked for the Postal Service!

Rain, snow, heat — it’s the kind of work that shows up no matter what. Thank you to all the postal workers who help keep our communities running.

Utilities cost too much! I spoke at the Renewable Energy and Energy Efficiency Expo about how we can bring home energy costs down and help families save on their monthly utility bills. https://t.co/94msESsSFa
Click here to submit your video! https://t.co/2r8rOfFzGv
America is turning 250! 🇺🇸 Scan the QR code to submit a short video on what our country means to you! https://t.co/EI01Ae16wn
I'm in Congress to make life more affordable for Kansans — not to protect the profits of big corporations. https://t.co/94khHICfpH
RT @EqualityCaucus: We know this Pride felt different for many in the LGBTQI+ community. As we round out Pride Month, our Chair, with sever…

This Kansas heat can be a lot. ☀️

Please take care of yourselves, drink plenty of water, and if you can, check in on a neighbor or loved one who might need a little extra help.

Here are some helpful safety tips: https://t.co/IBbOr9vJEa

Good read from @Forbes on the future of disability employment — and I'm proud it highlights my bill to ensure people with disabilities aren’t penalized for building savings and pursuing a career. https://t.co/XYzhMRsUmZ
Housing costs are still way too high, and families are stuck waiting for relief that’s already been passed. https://t.co/WFjBUZRDjo

Every Kansan deserves the opportunity to build a career.

Proud to see a new federal grant heading to @KansasCommerce to help young Kansans with intellectual disabilities gain job training and connect with quality jobs.
Read more here: https://t.co/qQQolbupvf

We’re still too focused on treating chronic disease after the fact — instead of preventing it in the first place.

Appreciated this week’s @metcoalition discussion on how new science and policy can help us shift toward prevention and better long-term health. https://t.co/KhhV1mtn3o

Sneaker Day in Congress 👟 Honestly, this feels made for me! I’m usually walking the halls in sneakers anyway. Cool seeing sport, design, and innovation all in one place. Thanks, @adidas! https://t.co/JjfX7cxhto

Recovery doesn't stop at the hospital door.

Great meeting with @EncompassHlth to discuss expanding access to inpatient rehabilitation so more Kansans can get back on their feet. https://t.co/fX8udKnGY7

New World screwworm is a parasite that attacks livestock and can destroy cattle herds.

I introduced the Protecting American Herds Act to stop its spread and protect Kansas ranchers and families from higher beef prices.

From Blue Valley High School to the U.S. Capitol 🎨

Congratulations to Olivia Wang for representing #KS03 at the Congressional Art Competition winners' reception. Kansas talent is on full display! https://t.co/5HftBbkfld

Eleven years ago, marriage equality became the law of the land in Obergefell v. Hodges

We've come a long way, but the fight for full equality isn't over. I'm proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community today and every day.

Safe communities, reliable water, and infrastructure that keep Ottawa moving forward.

I'm working with @ottawaksgov to get our project requests across the finish line. https://t.co/M5xZWP0bBb

New World Screwworm is a serious threat to our cattle industry and could drive up grocery prices for families.

I joined my @NewDemCoalition  colleagues in urging action to protect ranchers and stabilize our food supply. https://t.co/vY8bF6NRWj

That means longer drives for care. My bipartisan bill would help keep them open. https://t.co/nJmHZFEmo2

Today, @POTUS refused to sign it after his ceremony had already begun — all because of political games.

Families are struggling to afford a home. Stop the
A good business idea shouldn't have a smaller chance of succeeding simply because it starts in Indian Country. My bipartisan bill to fix this just passed. https://t.co/oO4vZMgKjA

No one should have to choose between paying for groceries or paying for lifesaving medications.

That's why I'm pushing to let Medicare negotiate lower prescription drug prices for everyone.
Fresh food. Local businesses. Strong community. I loved checking out the new downtown Overland Park Farmers' Market. 🌽🫐🥕 https://t.co/nwEZOiA3qM

Proud to recognize Turner School District with a flag flown over the U.S. Capitol. Their students, educators, and staff are doing incredible work for our community. #America250Week https://t.co/T6qXyiojT5
Great meeting with @CityofOlatheKS’ leadership team. Always helpful to stay aligned on priorities for the city’s growth and safety. https://t.co/8ZOkmgBl6l

Grateful to wrap #America250Week at the Paola VA clinic, where we care for the veterans who served our country.

Thanks for following along this week, #KS03! https://t.co/XICCqlmAXb

Happy Father’s Day to all the dads, grandfathers, and father figures who show up every day with love.

Grateful for the steady presence you are across #KS03.

Grateful to join American Legion Post 153 at the Olathe War Memorial for a moment of silence honoring those who served our country. Their sacrifice makes every day possible. #America250Week https://t.co/NO2MfCzMsl

The Truman Library is a powerful reminder that history isn’t abstract. It’s decisions, leadership, and impact that still shape us today. Grateful for the tour during my #America250Week. https://t.co/jwkJTMaBEc
Sunflower Elementary is what community looks like. Proud to honor their students and educators with a flag flown over the U.S. Capitol during #America250Week. https://t.co/YcqM6XdcDj
Exciting things are happening at the Miami County Airport. Great to see the projects made possible by the bipartisan infrastructure law helping prepare for future growth.🛬 https://t.co/QC0ovGGKJn
Juneteenth is a reminder that freedom isn't inevitable — it takes courage, perseverance, and people willing to fight for it. Today we honor that legacy. https://t.co/O63bwqfJ6Y

We're not flyover country — we're part of the reason America is what it is today.

Proud to help secure federal investments for the John Brown Historic Park and visit the team preserving that history in Osawatomie. #America250Week https://t.co/eD4rcAokK1
Not every day a Smithsonian exhibit comes to Kansas! Proud that Wyandotte County is hosting this piece of Native history. #America250Week https://t.co/lilrsHYf2D

Bison once nearly disappeared from the Great Plains.

Their comeback is one of America's greatest conservation success stories — and proof of what we can accomplish when we work together to protect what matters. #America250Week https://t.co/3Zk9DNUlGR
Proud to recognize Olathe West High School with a flag flown over the U.S. Capitol. The students, teachers, and staff make our community stronger every day. #America250Week https://t.co/LN8ZveMuXe

Did you know Kansas’ first school for Deaf and Hard of Hearing students is in #KS03?

Love stopping by @ksdeafschool and seeing how they’re continuing that legacy of inclusion and opportunity for every student. #America250Week https://t.co/6yUIViq1k3
Today is the first World Cup match here in KC! Excited for the next month of great games and community here in #KS03. ⚽ https://t.co/10C7zJ8P0c
